meta.title: Flying the world's first CIVILIAN F-16
meta.description:
Ride along for a flight in the first civilian F-16 with Hasard Lee as they fly in the aggressor role fighting against blue air.

If you're an organization that would like to partner on a video, reach out to hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

Every 100th person wins a PATCH  👉  https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/patchgiveaway

Sunglasses worn (military edition): https://www.kqzyfj.com/click-100684727-13292519 

📷 Produced by: Josh Hak (@joshua_hak) with help from Trey Eaton

SUBSCRIBE for regular videos▶ https://www.youtube.com/c/HasardLee

HOW TO CONNECT
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/hasardlee
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/hasardlee/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/hasardlee
Email--hasard@hasardlee(dot)com

🎙 Listen to the Podcast-- https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen

HASARD
F-35 fighter pilot, previously flew the F-16, including 82 combat missions. In 2016 selected as the Top Instructor Pilot of the Year for Shaw AFB. Mission commander and the only fighter pilot to fly two different types of jets into combat on the same day.


*Approved and adheres to AFI 1-1, USAF Social Media Policy. Opinions in this video do not represent the United States Air Force, DOD, or any other organization*
